property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: byzantineEquivocatingLeaderStillMakesProgress
testcase.system-out: [UdpTransport] listening on port 5000 [FL] Node 0 up on port 5000 [SL] Node 0 up [PL] Node 0 up [APL] Node 0 up w/ auth stuff [Node 0] up on port 5000 (leader for view 0 is 0, behavior=EQUIVOCATE_LEADER) [UdpTransport] listening on port 5001 [FL] Node 1 up on port 5001 [SL] Node 1 up [PL] Node 1 up [APL] Node 1 up w/ auth stuff [Node 1] up on port 5001 (leader for view 0 is 0, behavior=HONEST) [UdpTransport] listening on port 5002 [FL] Node 2 up on port 5002 [SL] Node 2 up [PL] Node 2 up [APL] Node 2 up w/ auth stuff [Node 2] up on port 5002 (leader for view 0 is 0, behavior=HONEST) [UdpTransport] listening on port 5003 [FL] Node 3 up on port 5003 [SL] Node 3 up [PL] Node 3 up [APL] Node 3 up w/ auth stuff [Node 3] up on port 5003 (leader for view 0 is 0, behavior=HONEST) [Client 203] up on port 6203 [Client 203] sent req 713eac98-a8ab-4a23-a629-fdfc165699de to node 0 [Client 203] sent req 713eac98-a8ab-4a23-a629-fdfc165699de to node 1 [Client 203] sent req 713eac98-a8ab-4a23-a629-fdfc165699de to node 2 [Client 203] sent req 713eac98-a8ab-4a23-a629-fdfc165699de to node 3 [Node 2] now on view 1 (timeout) [Node 0] now on view 1 (timeout) [Node 1] now on view 1 (timeout) [Node 3] now on view 1 (timeout) [Node 0] chain got: test-byz-equiv-1 [Node 2] chain got: test-byz-equiv-1 [Node 1] chain got: test-byz-equiv-1 [Node 0] now on view 2 (block decided) [Node 2] now on view 2 (block decided) [Node 1] now on view 2 (block decided) [Node 3] chain got: test-byz-equiv-1 [Node 3] now on view 2 (block decided) [Client 203] got reply frm node 2 (view 1): commited on view 1 [Client 203] stopped [Node 0] stopped [Node 1] stopped [Node 2] stopped [Node 3] stopped

testcase.name: invalidVoteSignatureByzantineNodeDoesNotBreakConsensus
testcase.system-out: [UdpTransport] listening on port 5000 [FL] Node 0 up on port 5000 [SL] Node 0 up [PL] Node 0 up [APL] Node 0 up w/ auth stuff [Node 0] up on port 5000 (leader for view 0 is 0, behavior=HONEST) [UdpTransport] listening on port 5001 [FL] Node 1 up on port 5001 [SL] Node 1 up [PL] Node 1 up [APL] Node 1 up w/ auth stuff [Node 1] up on port 5001 (leader for view 0 is 0, behavior=HONEST) [UdpTransport] listening on port 5002 [FL] Node 2 up on port 5002 [SL] Node 2 up [PL] Node 2 up [APL] Node 2 up w/ auth stuff [Node 2] up on port 5002 (leader for view 0 is 0, behavior=HONEST) [UdpTransport] listening on port 5003 [FL] Node 3 up on port 5003 [SL] Node 3 up [PL] Node 3 up [APL] Node 3 up w/ auth stuff [Node 3] up on port 5003 (leader for view 0 is 0, behavior=INVALID_VOTE_SIGNATURE) [Client 204] up on port 6204 [Client 204] sent req 38b63691-ef4f-4632-bf06-f60dc960ef88 to node 0 [Client 204] sent req 38b63691-ef4f-4632-bf06-f60dc960ef88 to node 1 [Client 204] sent req 38b63691-ef4f-4632-bf06-f60dc960ef88 to node 2 [Client 204] sent req 38b63691-ef4f-4632-bf06-f60dc960ef88 to node 3 [Node 1] chain got: test-invalid-vote-byz-1 [Node 1] now on view 1 (block decided) [Client 204] got reply frm node 1 (view 0): commited on view 0 [Node 2] chain got: test-invalid-vote-byz-1 [Node 2] now on view 1 (block decided) [Node 0] chain got: test-invalid-vote-byz-1 [Node 0] now on view 1 (block decided) [Node 3] chain got: test-invalid-vote-byz-1 [Node 3] now on view 1 (block decided) [Client 204] stopped [Node 0] stopped [Node 1] stopped [Node 2] stopped [Node 3] stopped

testcase.name: invalidNodeSignatureIsRejected
testcase.system-out: [UdpTransport] listening on port 5002 [FL] Node 2 up on port 5002 [SL] Node 2 up [PL] Node 2 up [APL] Node 2 up w/ auth stuff [Node 2] up on port 5002 (leader for view 6 is 2, behavior=HONEST) [Node 2] stopped
testcase.system-err: sig check blew up: Bad signature length: got 6 but was expecting 256 [APL] Node 1 sig looks bad, dropping it

testcase.name: timeoutViewChangeSurvivesLeaderCrash
testcase.system-out: [UdpTransport] listening on port 5001 [FL] Node 1 up on port 5001 [SL] Node 1 up [PL] Node 1 up [APL] Node 1 up w/ auth stuff [Node 1] up on port 5001 (leader for view 0 is 0, behavior=HONEST) [UdpTransport] listening on port 5002 [FL] Node 2 up on port 5002 [SL] Node 2 up [PL] Node 2 up [APL] Node 2 up w/ auth stuff [Node 2] up on port 5002 (leader for view 0 is 0, behavior=HONEST) [UdpTransport] listening on port 5003 [FL] Node 3 up on port 5003 [SL] Node 3 up [PL] Node 3 up [APL] Node 3 up w/ auth stuff [Node 3] up on port 5003 (leader for view 0 is 0, behavior=HONEST) [Client 201] up on port 6201 [Client 201] sent req e7151505-884e-4a38-a7f3-8ad7063ce636 to node 0 [Client 201] sent req e7151505-884e-4a38-a7f3-8ad7063ce636 to node 1 [Client 201] sent req e7151505-884e-4a38-a7f3-8ad7063ce636 to node 2 [Client 201] sent req e7151505-884e-4a38-a7f3-8ad7063ce636 to node 3 [Node 1] now on view 1 (timeout) [Node 3] now on view 1 (timeout) [Node 2] now on view 1 (timeout) [Node 2] chain got: test-failover-1 [Node 1] chain got: test-failover-1 [Node 2] now on view 2 (block decided) [Client 201] got reply frm node 2 (view 1): commited on view 1 [Node 1] now on view 2 (block decided) [Node 3] chain got: test-failover-1 [Node 3] now on view 2 (block decided) [Client 201] stopped [Node 1] stopped [Node 2] stopped [Node 3] stopped
